_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Grampian Annual Report 2014/15. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2014/15?
What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15 was 873,216 £000.

queries.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15?
queries.expected_answer: The Capital Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15 was 12,775 £000.

queries.question: Did NHS Grampian report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2014/15?
queries.expected_answer: An in-year surplus of £21,000 was recorded for the year against a target of breakeven.

queries.question: What was the Cash Requirement limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15?
queries.expected_answer: Cash Requirement limit for NHS Grampian in 2014/15 was 932,047 £000.

queries.question: How many whole time equivalent staff did NHS Grampian employ in 2014/15?
What was the sickness absence rate for NHS Grampian in 2014/15?

queries.expected_answer: 93.5% of people who started their first specialist drug treatment
